summary.note: M-120 records executed Rust workspace validation. M-121 records executed real macOS fixture evidence. M-122 records executed real-fixture feedback promotion. M-123 records executed real APFS parser checksum-semantics correction. M-124 through M-140 create reviewed open roadmap tracks for the remaining MVP, post-MVP, and mature-release hardening work. Production blockers still require macOS, Windows, platform, release, admin, and long-running CI execution.
